description: Create a precinct inventory by performing a spatial summary join using the voting precincts polygon layer (/home/ga/GIS_Data/election_data/precincts.geojson) and the polling places point layer (/home/ga/GIS_Data/election_data/polling_places.geojson). The output must be a polygon layer where each precinct contains fields for the total count of polling places and a concatenated string of their 'place_name' values. Export the result to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/precinct_inventory.geojson.
